---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem are you solving?**
<!-- The pain, not the solution. Real situation you ran into. -->

**Proposed approach**
<!-- Optional. If you have one. -->

**What you tried**
<!-- Existing scripts/tools that almost did it. Why they didn't. -->

**Scope check**
- [ ] Fits the "thin bash wrapper around CLI agents" philosophy
- [ ] Doesn't require running daemons or hosted servers
- [ ] Useful to >1 user (not org-specific)
